candidates.title: Direct Rule Or Fast Path Quality
candidates.hypothesis: Replace brittle canned replies with a targeted rule or richer fallback path.
candidates.acceptanceGate: Direct-rule regressions stay at zero and any targeted feedback case gets a clearly improved response on manual review.
humanReviewChecklist: Confirm the cluster diagnosis matches real failure examples.
Implement the smallest targeted change first.
Run evals on affected IDs and related regression categories.
Only promote if safety and trust behavior do not regress.
